subject: Statistics
title: Adaptive Clinical Trials
description: A short lesson to help you apply Adaptive Clinical Trials.

hook.text: Traditional trials lock in their design at the start. What if you could adapt as data comes in?

buildup.text: Adaptive trials modify their design — sample size, dosing, even which treatments are tested — based on interim results.

discovery.text: If one arm is clearly failing, patients get reassigned to the winning treatment. Faster answers, less waste.

twist.text: The flexibility comes with statistical complexity. You must pre-plan the adaptations to avoid inflating error rates.

climax.text: COVID-19 vaccine trials used adaptive designs, shaving months off development without sacrificing rigor.

punchline.text: Adapt as you learn. Rigid trials waste time and patients.

quiz.question: What is the key advantage of adaptive clinical trials?
options: They can modify the design based on interim results, producing answers faster
They eliminate the need for control groups
